food_name: Dunkin' Donuts Coffee and Donut Bundle
food_subgroup: Coffee beverages and baked goods bundle

ontology.foodon_gap_note: The specific contents of this commercial bundle are not precisely defined in FoodOn; the general mixed food product class is used as the closest parent.
ontology.foodex2_description: Composite food — mixed food product (closest parent); no exact FoodEx2 code exists for a commercial coffee-and-donut bundle.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: No exact FoodEx2 code exists for a commercial coffee-and-donut bundle; A000K (composite food) used as closest parent.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: No suitable SNOMED CT code identified for a commercial mixed coffee-and-donut bundle product.

serving.natural_language_portion: One estimated portion from the bundle, approximately 200 grams, representing a single serving of coffee and donut combined.

nutrient_source.title: USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy FDC ID 171891 (Coffee, brewed, prepared with tap water) and FDC ID 170299 (Doughnut, yeast-leavened, glazed, commercially prepared)
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: Nutrient values are an estimation based on a 50/50 weight average of generic brewed black coffee (USDA FDC ID 171891) and a generic glazed yeast-leavened donut (USDA FDC ID 170299). The exact contents of the 'Bundle of 3 x 200g' from Dunkin' Donuts are not specified in approved sources, necessitating this estimation. Micronutrients not reported by both source entries are set to -1 per sentinel-value convention.

gi_source.title: University of Sydney GI Database entry for Doughnut, yeast-leavened, glazed
gi_source.source_match_notes: Glycemic index of 76 is estimated based on the glazed yeast-leavened donut component as the primary source of glycemic carbohydrates in the bundle. Brewed black coffee contributes negligible glycemic carbohydrates and does not materially affect the composite GI.

hypertension.key_factor: Sodium content from processed baked goods in the donut component.
hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension should consume this bundle in moderation; the donut component contributes approximately 186 mg sodium per 100 g, and a full 200 g serving may deliver over 370 mg sodium, representing a meaningful fraction of the recommended daily limit of 2000 mg.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: High glycemic index (GI 76) and significant refined carbohydrate and sugar content from the glazed donut component.
type2_diabetes.guidance: Due to its high glycemic index of 76 and an estimated glycemic load of approximately 35.7 per 200 g serving, this bundle is not recommended for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes and should be avoided or replaced with lower-GI alternatives.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: High saturated fat content (approximately 5 g per 100 g) and overall calorie density from the fried and glazed donut component.
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Individuals with cardiovascular disease should limit or avoid this bundle due to its high saturated fat and calorie density, which may adversely affect LDL cholesterol levels and overall cardiovascular risk.

llm_training.natural_language_description: This record describes a 'Dunkin' Donuts Coffee and Donut Bundle', an interpretation of the generic 'Bundle of 3 x 200g' product listed on GrabFood Singapore from Dunkin' Donuts at Funan Mall. The bundle is assumed to contain a combination of brewed coffee and glazed yeast-leavened donuts, which are the signature offerings of the Dunkin' Donuts brand. Donuts of this type are prepared by mixing enriched wheat flour, sugar, yeast, eggs, milk, and fat into a dough, which is then shaped, proofed, deep-fried in vegetable oil until golden, and finished with a sweet sugar glaze. The resulting product has a soft, pillowy interior with a slightly chewy, glossy exterior and a rich, sweet flavour profile. Brewed coffee provides a bitter, aromatic counterpoint to the sweetness of the donut. Nutritionally, this estimated bundle is calorie-dense at approximately 199.5 kcal per 100 g, with significant refined carbohydrates (23.5 g per 100 g), sugars (13 g per 100 g), and saturated fat (5 g per 100 g). The glycemic index is estimated at 76 (high), driven by the glazed donut component, making this bundle clinically significant for individuals with Type 2 Diabetes, hypertension, and cardiovascular disease. In Singapore, Dunkin' Donuts is a popular quick-service brand offering Western-style baked goods and coffee beverages, commonly consumed as a breakfast item, mid-morning snack, or dessert. This bundle represents a typical indulgent treat in the Singapore food-service landscape.
common_user_queries: nutrients in coffee and donut combo
coffee and donut set nutrition facts

confidence_reason: The input food_name 'Bundle of 3 x 200g' is highly ambiguous. The exact contents of this commercial bundle from Dunkin' Donuts are not specified in any approved nutritional database. Nutritional and GI data are based on an estimation using a 50/50 weight average of generic brewed black coffee and a glazed yeast-leavened donut from USDA FoodData Central, which is a significant assumption. Confidence is therefore low.
notes: This record is an interpretation of a vague product name. The food_name has been re-interpreted from 'Bundle of 3 x 200g' to 'Dunkin' Donuts Coffee and Donut Bundle' to allow for nutritional estimation.
